title: populus rockii
intro: Populus rockii, also known as Rock Poplar, is a deciduous tree species native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Populus rockii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Populus rockii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
